title: ECO NAVIGATION SERVICES - 211info
text: NOWIA UNETE ECO NAVIGATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to immigration legal services including access to lawyers, legal clinics, financial assistance with filing fees, and general information and instruction about immigration law and immigrant rights. 607 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Households at or below 200% of the federal poverty level (FPL) Hours: Monday-Friday noon-3pm and 4pm-7pm Email (541) 245-1625 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 245-1625 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance off Mistletoe Street Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - FAMILIAS ESPECIALES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH INSURANCE MARKETPLACE LEGAL SERVICES - CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NOWIA UNETE
